open_positions.entry_reason: BTC CRYPTO MOMENTUM (Priority 4) — Monday Apr 14. Macro gate GREEN: QQQ $614.57 above 50-day MA $600.34 ✅ | VIX 19.5 below 25 ✅. BTC recovering from tariff-selloff lows. Dollar weakness play after tariff pause + Iran ceasefire. Risk-on environment confirmed. Re-entering below previous $76k position for superior R/R. Entry $72,309.85 | Stop $69,706.70 (-3.6%) | Target $78,528.50 (+8.6%) | R/R 2.4:1
open_positions.thesis: Dollar weakness + risk-on macro catalyst is the core driver. Tariff pause (Apr 9) and Iran ceasefire (Apr 8) were back-to-back regime-change events that weakened the USD. BTC historically benefits from USD softening. Previous position entered at $76k was stopped at $73k during max fear; re-entry at $72.3k is a better price. BTC was trading above EMA 50/100/200 before the selloff — strong structural base. Crypto has no gap risk (trades 24/7). PLTR flagged as next entry (RSI 29.6, oversold) when capital frees up from this position.
